title: Bill Boies, ’68, Honored with National Legal Aid & Defender Association’s 2024 Arthur von Briesen Award | University of Chicago Law School
text:
Bill Boies, ’68, Honored with National Legal Aid & Defender Association’s 2024 Arthur von Briesen Award
Wilber Boies Honored With National Legal Aid & Defender Association’s 2024 Arthur von Briesen Award
International law firm [McDermott Will & Emery](https://www.mwe.com/) is pleased to announce [Wilber (Bill) Boies](https://www.mwe.com/people/boies-wilber-h/) has received the 2024 Arthur von Briesen Award from the National Legal Aid & Defender Association (NLADA).
A member of McDermott’s litigation practice, Bill leads a pro bono program that advises national legal aid organizations, Interest on Lawyers’ Trust Account programs, and bar foundations on cy pres awards from the undistributed residue of class action settlement funds. Bill frequently files amicus briefs opposing appeals that argue for the elimination of cy pres awards and advocates for state statutes and court rules supporting cy pres awards for legal aid organizations.
Read more at [
McDermott Will & Emery
](https://www.mwe.com/media/wilber-boies-honored-with-national-legal-aid-defender-associations-2024-arthur-von-briesen-award/)
